live-musicians.author: Abbey
live-musicians.text:
HIGHLY RECOMMEND!!

Corey and the team at COS Celebrations are absolute rockstars.  We just got married at The Lightner Museum in St Augustine and everything was amazing.  The Sax and Drummer were amazing touches that gave an awesome live music feel blended with the DJ set up.  Music was great and the dancing did not stop until the party came to an end.   Curated music for both cocktail hour and reception with an emphasis on detail and making our dreams come true.  If you have a vision just let them know and they will execute.

Highly recommend!!
live-musicians.title: Must use!

live-musicians.author: Lexi K
live-musicians.text: I cannot recommend Corey from COS enough. He fully exceeded our expectations when we were supposed to have our wedding at the White Room back in October but it got postponed to November due to hurricane Milton. He was able to accommodate on short notice and fully helped make our postponed reception the best night ever. Between him playing the saxophone and playing music that catered to the crowd we couldn't get off the dance floor the whole night. The planning process was so seamless (even with my million little questions and last minute additions) with the help from Corey and Kyle. We added the Saxophone, violin, uplighting, and photo booth, don't skip out on the sax it is fully worth it to have a little bit of live music!!! Would recommend a million times over again 11/10, I can't thank them enough!!

live-musicians.author: Danielle
live-musicians.text:
Highly recommend the entire COS Celebrations team! 

Marc was absolutely fabulous and played such a huge role in making our wedding unforgettable. He got the party going, kept the energy up all night, and truly did everything right. From the music selection to reading the room, everything felt seamless and so well done.

We also had the photo booth, which was a huge hit with our guests and added such a fun element to the night. On top of that, Gabriel, the sax player during cocktail hour, completely elevated the atmosphere and made that part of the evening feel so special and memorable.

I also have to mention Kyle, who handled the setup and was incredibly responsive throughout the process. He made everything feel easy and stress-free.

We were so happy with the entire team and would highly recommend them for a wedding or any special event.
live-musicians.title: The Perfect Wedding Entertainment Team

live-musicians.author: Liz
live-musicians.text:
Corey is THE BEST wedding DJ! If you're reading this and on the fence about booking Corey at COS Celebrations, stop reading and book him! Corey was so accommodating from the start. My husband and I live across the country and Corey flexed his schedule so we could zoom with him after west coast working hours. I always knew I wanted a drummer with a DJ at my wedding and Corey not only made that happen but also brought his sax! Communication was A+...timely and efficient. 

They have a very user-friendly app making it beyond easy to allocate song selections for each milestone moment throughout the day (including a 'do not play' list!). We had another zoom call with Corey a few weeks before the wedding where we talked through all the details...I am not lying when we were on the call for almost 2 hours where Corey answered any and all of our questions, offering unbiased advice when we asked for it. 

The audio the day of the wedding was perfect. We had an outdoor ceremony and Corey has grade A equipment and sound set up so everyone could hear us and the officiant perfectly. No static, no microphone feedback, nothing! We also had some specific music timing requests that Corey nailed. The dance portion of our wedding was truly epic. We had the drummer (which I HIGHLY recommend!) and Corey surprised us with his sax and it was show stopping! 

Corey helped make our wedding day run so smoothly. He was able to seamlessly guide our guests from location to location throughout the day. His emcee skills, calm demeanor, professional manner, and genuine care in making sure our day was perfect was something we'll never forget. We're almost a month out from our wedding day and guests will still tell us how much fun the dance floor was and what a great addition Corey was to our day! A big THANK YOU to Corey and COS Celebrations!
live-musicians.title: The BEST wedding DJ!

live-musicians.author: Chelsea
live-musicians.text: We were lucky enough to book COS Celebrations and DJ Corey for our NYE wedding at the end of 2023.  Corey immediately came across as an organized and reliable professional that knows how to have fun! We were able to meet with Corey prior to our wedding (virtually as we live 2 time zones away) and he made the entire process fun and personalized to exactly what we wanted.  We had secured a wedding planner and day of coordinator, but honestly, I could see how working with Corey you may not even need that (but shout out to Kelsi Elizabeth Events for being the best planner!!).  He was extremely communicative during the days leading up to and during our wedding, always making sure we were taken care of and having a great time.  We opted to add the Saxaphone add on and it was INCREDIBLE.  Everyone loved it and really got the party pumped up for NYE.  We also booked his extra lighting, cold sparklers and photobooth - everything was so great and really completed the event.  I could not recommend Corey enough; he made our day so special and provided a top-notch service.  You need Corey/COS on your vendor team!!
live-musicians.title: Best DJ in St. Augustine!!

live-musicians.author: Katherine H
live-musicians.text:
Words can’t describe how special Corey and his team made my husband’s and my wedding day at the Lightner Museum in St. Augustine. Being from Boston, this was a destination wedding, and Corey and Kyle put us at ease every step of the way. Any questions we had were answered right away and very thoughtfully, which truly gave us peace of mind.

Corey made every single moment so special for us—he even played the sax during our entrance song, and it got the crowd going wild! We will truly never forget these moments and can’t recommend COS Celebrations enough. We feel so lucky to have worked with them and will absolutely be using them again for future events.

Corey is hands down the best DJ we could have ever asked for. He read the room perfectly, kept the energy high all night, and had every single guest on the dance floor. The music, the vibes, the transitions—everything was flawless. If you want a DJ who truly elevates your wedding and creates an unforgettable party, Corey is your guy.

live-musicians.author: Nicole B
live-musicians.text: Corey is the best. It was an incredible night and the dance floor was never empty. He is genuine and a great person to work with. We trusted him wholeheartedly to put together a song list that matched with who we are as people. He also checked in with us many times over the course of the night to see how we were doing and even offered to grab us drinks from the bar. The saxophone during Cocktail Hour was exceptional and he was able to work in a few Billy Joel songs to keep the Long Islanders in attendance happy. He was organized and utilized an app that allowed us to easily fill in song requests, first dance songs, last dance songs, etc. so that the night was all about what we wanted. We also loved the personalization for the photobooth background that Kyle put together for us featuring the St. Augustine Lighthouse. You can't go wrong with COS Celebrations, they are top notch in terms of entertainment and professionalism.

live-musicians.author: Victoria C
live-musicians.text:
COS was fantastic. We really appreciated being able to book our ceremony, cocktail hour and reception music, dance floor lighting, and extra audio equipment through one company.

Most importantly, Greg was EXCELLENT. From helping us with our music selection, playing the saxophone live, learning songs that were special to us, and managing the energy and flow of the wedding, Greg delivered 100% effort on each. All our guests were so impressed with him too - we got so many compliments, especially when he was on the dance floor with the guests ripping the sax! We highly recommend Greg for any event. He made our wedding so incredibly special!

live-musicians.author: Megan P
live-musicians.text: We are so happy we went with DJ Corey and COS Celebrations for our wedding! DJ Corey is absolutely incredible - from playing the music we selected to adding his own options that all of our guests loved - he made sure to keep everyone having the best time. Plus, his saxophone playing for some of the songs was a hit! From the first meeting, to the big day, COS Celebrations made sure everything was set and organized. We felt so comfortable working with them. We also hired Jeremy as a pianist for our wedding and he took the time to learn a song that I wanted to walk down the aisle to. They truly provide above and beyond service. I highly recommend COS Celebrations for your event! 10/10

live-musicians.author: Christine
live-musicians.text: Corey helped us recruit a drummer and harpist and he played the sax all night long. We had a blast and our guests did too. He also brought lighting and a co2 gun which made the party that much more fun. At the end of the night my husband hopped on the drum set and it felt like we were at a concert!!! He also brought Mics for the night and all the little things we never thought of. Everything was top notch. We took a lot of time to find the right person to bring music into our wedding and Corey was very responsive from the beginning and willing to listen to all our ideas to make our wedding day perfect. He outshone the 10+ other vendors we had spoken to in our search and we will use him again for events in the future. Highly recommended him for your wedding or event you won’t be disappointed!
live-musicians.title: Corey gets the party started!

live-musicians.author: Tyler
live-musicians.text: COS celebrations and Corey did an absolutely perfect job for my wedding at Casa Marina in Jacksonville, FL. My wife and I met with him several times on zoom at no additional charge to discuss timeline and our desire for music selection and each time he was patient, professional, and truly helpful with adding inspiration or ideas for our party. He even set his zoom background to our venue so we could point and show him where things would be set up and done. The interface and app he and his team use to select our playlist was seamless to use, easy to edit, and allowed us to include others in our wedding party from a distance to select songs. He coordinated with all of our vendors and executed our timeline perfectly without us having to lift a finger, allowing us to truly enjoy our day. We had a wide range of ages at the wedding, and he used our playlist to make decisions in situ based on who was on the floor to keep the party moving all night. Also, he brought a saxophone and played it as part of the music during the dancing which was electric and made a lot of our guests very happy. We contracted live music through Corey for our welcome social the night before, and he handled booking that artist and delivering our vision. Corey truly wanted our night to be perfect and was invested in making sure the dance floor was always rocking. People came up to us, both old and young, and told us they had never seen a dance floor so full all night at a wedding. If you are looking for a DJ who is professional, artistic, easy to work with, and who will really care about making your day special, I can not recommend Corey and COS entertainment highly enough. He was the best I have ever seen at a wedding.
live-musicians.title: Perfect, Best I have ever seen

live-musicians.author: Elena
live-musicians.text: DJ Marc was so amazing! The dance floor was going all night long. I have gotten countless complements on the music played and how amazing it was! We also hired a saxophone player for the reception and a guitarist for the ceremony through COS. The guitarist was a lovely addition, the guest enjoyed music as they wait for us to come in. He played all the ceremony reception music on guitar, it was spectacular. The saxophone player was at the reception and he was a huge hit! He kept (along with the amazing DJ Marc) the party going all night! He got on the dance floor and was interactive with the guest, he truly elevated the reception! I cannot say enough good things about this team, they are spectacular!
live-musicians.title: Amazing! Kept the dance floor alive all night!

live-musicians.author: Riley
live-musicians.text: I can't say enough about the COS team. Truly was so blessed to have them for our wedding and highly recommend them. From start to finish they made every vision and dream come true to make our magical night a reality. Corey and his team are absolutely amazing and treat you like family and make the process flawless and easy. We are so grateful and appreciative of everything they did for us on the most important and special day of our lives. The amount of people from our wedding that complimented the team and Corey as well was amazing! Corey's saxophone skills was just the perfect touch to making the ceremony and dance floor EPIC! Thank you so so much, our day would not have been what it was with out you guys!
live-musicians.title: We love the COS team!

live-musicians.author: Sydney
live-musicians.text: When choosing a DJ for our wedding, I didn’t consider how big of a role a DJ could have on our wedding day. As a destination bride I knew very little about local vendors, but following our first meeting I knew COS Celebrations would be the perfect fit for our intimate wedding. Corey continued to be a huge help as our big day approached and honestly felt more helpful than my wedding planner at times. Prior to our wedding he over our timeline in great length and reached out to my vendors. On our wedding day, Corey did an outstanding job at playing songs that went along with the vibe of our guests. He killed it on sax during our reception and it was 100% worth it, so for those considering it I would definitely recommend! His whole set up was insane! He surprised us with cold sparklers which lit up the dance floor and looked amazing in photos. Corey was so great that even our other vendors and guests were raving about him. All in all, we had an amazing experience with COS Celebrations and you would be making a huge mistake by not choosing him to be a part of your big day. Thank you again for making our day perfect!
live-musicians.title: amazing & talented!!!

live-musicians.author: Jessica
live-musicians.text: Corey was 10000/10 and beyond expectations. COS Celebrations is a great vendor to work with, from Kyle helping coordinate everything and her speedy and helpful responses. We had the great pleasure of being introduced to Corey and I wish I could relive our wedding day… I couldn’t recommend the Saxophone addition more.. it was incredible!!! I’m happy to have gotten video content so that we can relive the night and entertainment. AMAZING!!! To note… I planned my Florida wedding from California where we live, and this team won me over a Zoom call in minutes. From the friendliness to the services available… I couldn’t recommend more!
live-musicians.title: I couldn’t recommend more… DO IT

live-musicians.author: Maddie
live-musicians.text:
Corey was amazing from start to finish. He made everything feel so easy and smooth, and we never had to worry about a thing. As an MC, he was spot on, keeping the energy up and the guests engaged without ever overdoing it.

The saxophone was such a fun touch and honestly one of the highlights of the night. So many of our guests have mentioned how much they loved it and how packed the dance floor was all evening. Corey really knew how to read the room, and his playlist was perfect. We danced the night away and honestly would have loved to keep going!

What we appreciated most was how much effort he put into making the night feel like us. It didn’t feel generic at all. He really took the time to get it just right, and it showed, not only to us (bride and groom) but also to the guests. He went above and beyond, and we’re so so glad we chose him.

We couldn’t recommend Corey more and would absolutely book him again in the future. Thank you so much, Corey and Kyle, for everything you did to make our day so special! We truly felt like we were in the best hands.
live-musicians.title: The best crew!!!

live-musicians.author: Elizabeth M
live-musicians.text: We were fortunate enough to have DJ Greg at our daughter’s wedding. He was recommended by Laurel Bernsten of Old City Occasions and he didn’t disappoint. She said he would be the best and he was. Our event was planned in three months and with his expertise (and Laurels) everything flowed together like we’d had months to work on it. Greg was communicative throughout the entire process with thoughtful pointers (music choices, timing, etc). The ceremony flowed into cocktail hour flowed into dinner and then he gently “got the party started” and we didn’t stop until we sadly had to wind things down. An event enjoyed by all and many, many memories made. Thank you DJ Greg for being the professional vinyl spinner and Saxophonist that you are….we loved share our backyard with you :)

live-musicians.author: Madeline P
live-musicians.text:

We couldn’t recommend Corey more and would absolutely book him again in the future. Thank you so much, Corey and Kyle, for everything you did to make our day so special! We truly felt like we were in the best hands.

live-musicians.author: Angelica B
live-musicians.text: COS Celebrations Entertainment was an excellent choice for our wedding entertainment. Corey was great at communicating - we had 2 zoom meetings with him and he had his own app to help coordinate music and announcements. He was a one stop shop, as we also used their photobooths and loved how they were able to put our logo on the prints. My venue was indoor outdoor and I wanted speeches done outside, and Corey was great about setting up wireless mics and speakers to make that happen. My friends went nuts when he started playing sax - he really got the party started and kept the dance floor packed all night long. He even helped edit our first dance. COS Celebrations Entertainment provided incredible value and made our wedding day truly special.

live-musicians.author: Catherine S
live-musicians.text: DJ C-Zone with COS Celebrations absolutely brought down the house at our wedding. The dance floor was packed the entire night, and to really encapsulate his talents in one sentence: he knows how to read a room. COS utilizes a mobile app where you can upload a playlist as well as songs you want them to avoid. What sets him apart is that he’s a true Disc Jockey AND a tenured musician (Saxophone). We cannot recommend getting the saxophone and full room uplighting add ons enough.  They made all the difference with making our reception look and feel like a movie montage! Every song was perfectly timed, he would foreshadow the next song to get the crowd excited, and he would step out on the dance floor to rip on the Sax at the perfect time EVERY time. It wasn’t too much or too little. It was absolutely perfect. I truly did not leave the dance floor the entire night until the very end when it was time to change into my send off dress! Thank you, DJ C-Zone for taking the time to listen to our dream as well as weighing in your recommendations based on your expertise that only made the experience 10x better. Our wedding was a total movie, and our guests haven’t stopped talking about our amazing DJ!

live-musicians.author: Madison B
live-musicians.text: COS did an amazing job at our wedding reception at TPC Sawgrass. We had so many people come up to us complimenting our DJ Corey. He was great and his saxophone playing was incredible! We had a great experience with the whole team. They did a wonderful job of communicating and making sure our music was personalized to our preferences! You truly can’t go wrong with COS celebrations!

live-musicians.author: Anna
live-musicians.text: Corey & team were an absolute dream to work with! From start to finish, they made the process incredibly easy for us. We were interested in having both live music and a DJ. COS set us up with the best in class entertainers - we had a violinist, pianist saxophonist and DJ that were all beyond talented and kept our dance floor packed. Our guests couldn’t stop gushing over how great the music was. In addition to being talented, the whole team was incredibly professional and made our wedding run incredibly smooth! Thank you, COS!!
live-musicians.title: 10/10 experience!

live-musicians.author: Josh
live-musicians.text:
We had the pleasure of working with Corey and his team for our wedding ceremony, cocktail hour, and reception. From the beginning, Corey was very impressive and made us feel confident he would provide great entertainment for our guests. He took note of any music requests we had and made us feel heard throughout the whole process- he had a very user friendly planning app for the music selection. His understanding of our goals for the music of the wedding was spotless. He brought so much energy and kept the dance floor packed all night. He went above and beyond on the day of- keeping us updated on what was next in the line up and checked if we needed a drink, water, etc. Everything from his sax talents to the uplighting was first class. All of our guests gave their highest compliments for the music for the whole evening. We are so thankful we found and booked Corey and COS- our wedding would not have been the same without him! We highly recommend using him for the perfect combination of live music/DJ for your special event. 

- The Appel’s
live-musicians.title: First Class

live-musicians.author: Katie
live-musicians.text:
COS was one of 3 we interviewed for our wedding. My husband set up the calls. I have known Corey since high school and while I love hiring locals and friends, the fit still has to feel right. So my husband sets up a call. I truthfully had no idea which DJ it was going to be. We have our first call and I'm BLOWN away. The knowledge. The passion. The willingness to go with our wants and ideas. Our song choices were wild and entrance we wanted. Zero pushback or hesitation. Only to get off the phone and me ask my husband, "who was ..That's who I want." 

He was perfect (for me). Only to find out afterwards it was COS. Corey is so on the money. He has so much passion. He plays the saxophone beautifully. He basically DJ'd for a big group of kids 90% of the time. It rained our wedding day and so many people didn't show or even worse left early!! He did amazing. I applaud him for having little to work with. Have to say the whole place got up for Cupid's Shuffle. That was so amazing to see and be a part of!

He's dressed to the nines. Constantly smiling.

The final call to go over everything and to finalize, he had me 100% confident. I would hire Corey again in a heartbeat ..especially if he does kids bday parties! 

COS is worth E V E R Y single penny. Don't think twice. Book them now!
live-musicians.title: We love Corey

live-musicians.author: Lisa
live-musicians.text: I cannot sing the praises enough for CosCelebrations. If any bride is looking to find the best saxophone player around, well look no further than Corey at CosCelebrations. The musical talent he displayed at our reception was beyond our wildest dreams and made our reception the biggest dance celebration around. Not only is he a genius on the sax but when I had an idea to add drums, Corey also found a drummer and together with our DJ they just brought the house down. Corey was a total delight from start to finish and never balked at any of my ideas and help make them a reality. Also, I appreciated from a business standpoint that all my emails and calls were answered promptly and contracts were so easy to read and accessible. Hiring CosCelebrations made it possible to have the best of both worlds by having a DJ and adding live music with the addition of Corey on Sax and LA on the drums. Give CosCelebrations a call if you are looking for entertainment for your wedding reception or next big event. I promise you will be delighted by his talent and will not regret hiring and using Corey and his company CosCelebrations.
live-musicians.title: Cos celebrations is Amazing!!!

live-musicians.author: Jenna
live-musicians.text: I recently used COS Celebrations for my wedding and I couldn't be happier with my experience. Corey, the owner, was an absolute pleasure to work with throughout the planning process. He was always available to answer any questions or address any concerns I had. On the day of the wedding, Corey not only played the saxophone during the ceremony and reception, but he also came on the dance floor and added an extra level of excitement to the party. He truly made our wedding unforgettable. His talent is undeniable and his prices are affordable. I highly recommend COS Celebrations for any special event.
live-musicians.title: Unforgettable Wedding Experience with COS Celebrations - A 5-Star Vendor

live-musicians.author: Joseph G
live-musicians.text: Greg DJ'd our wedding and also played the sax — and let me tell you, he was phenomenal! Communication throughout the entire process was a breeze, and the planning portal was super helpful. He nailed every song we wanted and made the whole night flow perfectly from one moment to the next. Greg even took the time to custom cut and condense a 7-minute song for my father-daughter dance, which made it so much more special. It was truly a joy working with Greg and COS Celebrations. There’s nothing better than being able to fully trust your DJ and just enjoy your day. Huge shoutout to Kyle as well — she was 10/10 on email communication. I highly recommend them to anyone looking for an amazing wedding DJ!

live-musicians.text:
We had the pleasure of working with Corey and his team for our wedding ceremony, cocktail hour, and reception. We highly recommend using him for the perfect combination of live music/DJ for your special event.

live-musicians.author: Jenna S
live-musicians.text:
BOOK COS CELEBRATIONS!!!
When my now husband and I started planning our wedding the music was one of our number one priorities! When I found COS Celebrations it honestly felt too good to be true! Corey called us that night and took the time to answer any questions we had and we got the best vibes! Throughout the planning process Corey was extremely responsive and helpful anytime we needed something. The app was so easy to use! We had our full planning call and then we had some very last minute changes the day of the wedding. I texted Corey and the changes were handled flawlessly! My bridesmaids did a surprise song and asked Corey for the song day of for their speech, which Corey handled easily.

We opted for the Sax for ceremony and cocktail and the Sax, Drummer and DJ combo for the reception. Everyone is still raving about it! The drummer was amazing and played all night! Corey also brought the up lights and tube lights for our reception. We felt like we got so much value for everything. If the music is something you care about then you need to book COS Celebrations!!

live-musicians.author: Ellen H
live-musicians.text:
Corey was THE BEST DJ to work with for our wedding. Throughout the planning process, he was always so friendly and communicative. He even helped us adjust our playlist up until a few days before the event.

He also coordinated a live guitar player for our ceremony and photo booth for our reception. The guitar player was STELLAR and the photo booth was huge hit.

Most importantly, Corey brought amazing vibes to our wedding reception. His sax playing really elevated the party spirit! Our guests didn't leave the dance floor, as Corey kept playing hit after hit. He did an amazing job of understanding our music taste as a couple and reading the energy of the room to keep the party going. 

I would wholeheartedly recommend Corey and COS celebrations, especially for couples looking for a high-energy dance floor at their wedding!

live-musicians.author: Emma
live-musicians.text:
COS Celebrations truly knows how to create an unforgettable experience. We had the pleasure of working with Corey as our DJ, and he brought an incredible live saxophone element to the dance floor. From the start, he took the time to really understand us as a couple and carefully listened to the vibe we wanted for our reception. The dance floor stayed packed all night and not one song played that didn't have the crowd dancing.

His ability to blend great music with live sax during the dancing portion made our wedding feel so unique, energetic, and fun. It added a special touch that our guests are still talking about, we had so many people comment on the sax portion of the wedding and mention how fun the dance floor was. We had an amazing time, and it wouldn’t have been the same without him. We’re so grateful and can’t thank him enough!
live-musicians.title: Couldn't recommend more!

live-musicians.author: Kalie
live-musicians.text: DJ Corey is the best!!!! Having the perfect wedding DJ was a high priority to us as we wanted the dance floor packed all night. We wanted to blend the mainstream music enjoyed by most guests and generations with our more unique EDM/dance music. We also wanted to have sax as part of our dinner and dance set and Corey SHOWED UP!!! He truly made all of our wedding party visions come to life and read the room perfectly! The dance floor was packed all night! Many quests commented that he was the best wedding DJ they had ever experienced! He was the perfect blend of skill, talent, party, and professionalism! We can’t recommend DJ Corey enough!
live-musicians.title: Wedding DJ & Saxophonist

live-musicians.author: Erin
live-musicians.text:
Corey was absolutely phenomenal at our wedding after party. We originally found him because he completely crushed it at our friends’ wedding, and we knew we had to have him for ours, and somehow he was even better than we remembered.

From the very beginning, Corey was amazing to work with. He really took the time to understand the exact vibe we wanted for the night and worked with us to bring that vision to life. He was incredibly collaborative and intentional, and the best part was that he completely respected the tone we were going for and never strayed from it. The music felt so us, which made the night even more special.

Corey doesn’t just DJ. He turns the entire night into an experience. His ability to read the room and keep the energy high was incredible, and the dance floor was packed the entire time. What really sets him apart is that he plays live saxophone along with the tracks, and it takes everything to another level. The combination of DJing and live sax is electric & every time he jumped in with the sax the crowd went wild. 

Our guests are still talking about how fun the after party was and how amazing Corey was. If you want a DJ who will bring unbelievable energy, talent, and something truly unique to your event, Corey is your guy. We truly cannot recommend him enough.
live-musicians.title: You need corey as your wedding dj

live-musicians.author: Alexa
live-musicians.text:
We cannot say enough great things about COS Celebrations and Marc our DJ. We felt comfortable and confident with Marc from the first call that he was going to make our vision come to life. Guests from every age group said how great the music was, and the dance floor was never empty.

Marc did a fantastic job mixing all the different styles and incorporating music for all ages, mixing high energy and slow songs perfectly.

He has an ear and an eye for reading the room and choosing the next song so we never skipped a beat. Our night ended perfectly with our favorite songs surrounded by all our friends and we couldn’t have hoped for a better wedding reception.

We also loved the addition of a live violinist during the ceremony and guest arrival, and Guillermo was fantastic. It added so much to the overall feeling and was the perfect enhancement.

COS Celebrations was absolutely the best fit for our dream wedding and Marc exceeded our expectations. We will forever remember this incredible night and we cannot recommend them enough!!

We not only used him as our DJ, but he also provided music for our ceremony and is the best Saxophone player I have ever heard! Our guests raved about the sax during cocktail hour and he even incorporated the sax during the reception with our music selection. We also got cold sparks through COS and were surprised with incredible uplighting for the reception. COS offers an easy to use planner that allows you to pick your playlist for every specific moment of the night- from dinner, to cake cutting, the dance floor, “surprise” moments, private dance, as well as areas to input where speeches will be given and verbiage you want Corey to use for announcements. dance-floor.title: The Perfect Wedding Entertainment Team

dance-floor.author: Liz
dance-floor.text:
Corey is THE BEST wedding DJ! If you're reading this and on the fence about booking Corey at COS Celebrations, stop reading and book him! Corey was so accommodating from the start. My husband and I live across the country and Corey flexed his schedule so we could zoom with him after west coast working hours. I always knew I wanted a drummer with a DJ at my wedding and Corey not only made that happen but also brought his sax! Communication was A+...timely and efficient. 

They have a very user-friendly app making it beyond easy to allocate song selections for each milestone moment throughout the day (including a 'do not play' list!). We had another zoom call with Corey a few weeks before the wedding where we talked through all the details...I am not lying when we were on the call for almost 2 hours where Corey answered any and all of our questions, offering unbiased advice when we asked for it. 

The audio the day of the wedding was perfect. We had an outdoor ceremony and Corey has grade A equipment and sound set up so everyone could hear us and the officiant perfectly. No static, no microphone feedback, nothing! We also had some specific music timing requests that Corey nailed. The dance portion of our wedding was truly epic. We had the drummer (which I HIGHLY recommend!) and Corey surprised us with his sax and it was show stopping! 

Corey helped make our wedding day run so smoothly. He was able to seamlessly guide our guests from location to location throughout the day. His emcee skills, calm demeanor, professional manner, and genuine care in making sure our day was perfect was something we'll never forget. We're almost a month out from our wedding day and guests will still tell us how much fun the dance floor was and what a great addition Corey was to our day! A big THANK YOU to Corey and COS Celebrations!
dance-floor.title: The BEST wedding DJ!

dance-floor.author: Chelsea
dance-floor.text: We were lucky enough to book COS Celebrations and DJ Corey for our NYE wedding at the end of 2023.  Corey immediately came across as an organized and reliable professional that knows how to have fun! We were able to meet with Corey prior to our wedding (virtually as we live 2 time zones away) and he made the entire process fun and personalized to exactly what we wanted.  We had secured a wedding planner and day of coordinator, but honestly, I could see how working with Corey you may not even need that (but shout out to Kelsi Elizabeth Events for being the best planner!!).  He was extremely communicative during the days leading up to and during our wedding, always making sure we were taken care of and having a great time.  We opted to add the Saxaphone add on and it was INCREDIBLE.  Everyone loved it and really got the party pumped up for NYE.  We also booked his extra lighting, cold sparklers and photobooth - everything was so great and really completed the event.  I could not recommend Corey enough; he made our day so special and provided a top-notch service.  You need Corey/COS on your vendor team!!

Corey made every single moment so special for us—he even played the sax during our entrance song, and it got the crowd going wild! We will truly never forget these moments and can’t recommend COS Celebrations enough. We feel so lucky to have worked with them and will absolutely be using them again for future events.

Corey is hands down the best DJ we could have ever asked for. He read the room perfectly, kept the energy high all night, and had every single guest on the dance floor. The music, the vibes, the transitions—everything was flawless. If you want a DJ who truly elevates your wedding and creates an unforgettable party, Corey is your guy.

dance-floor.text: Corey is the best. It was an incredible night and the dance floor was never empty. He is genuine and a great person to work with. We also loved the personalization for the photobooth background that Kyle put together for us featuring the St. Augustine Lighthouse. You can't go wrong with COS Celebrations, they are top notch in terms of entertainment and professionalism.

dance-floor.author: Kevin
dance-floor.text:
Marc brought all the vibes!! I can’t even begin to imagine our special day without Marc and COS. From the beginning they were amazing. Easy to work with and always communicating professionally but yet relaxed. They put us first.

From the ceremony music to the grand entrance to the party on the dance floor, we were blessed to have Marc making the music happen. I highly recommend COS and Marc, what an incredible talent. Thank you Marc!!!
dance-floor.title: Amelia Vibes with Marc!!

dance-floor.text:
COS was fantastic. We really appreciated being able to book our ceremony, cocktail hour and reception music, dance floor lighting, and extra audio equipment through one company.

He outshone the 10+ other vendors we had spoken to in our search and we will use him again for events in the future. Highly recommended him for your wedding or event you won’t be disappointed!
dance-floor.title: Corey gets the party started!

dance-floor.text: COS celebrations and Corey did an absolutely perfect job for my wedding at Casa Marina in Jacksonville, FL. My wife and I met with him several times on zoom at no additional charge to discuss timeline and our desire for music selection and each time he was patient, professional, and truly helpful with adding inspiration or ideas for our party. He even set his zoom background to our venue so we could point and show him where things would be set up and done. The interface and app he and his team use to select our playlist was seamless to use, easy to edit, and allowed us to include others in our wedding party from a distance to select songs. He coordinated with all of our vendors and executed our timeline perfectly without us having to lift a finger, allowing us to truly enjoy our day. We had a wide range of ages at the wedding, and he used our playlist to make decisions in situ based on who was on the floor to keep the party moving all night. Also, he brought a saxophone and played it as part of the music during the dancing which was electric and made a lot of our guests very happy. We contracted live music through Corey for our welcome social the night before, and he handled booking that artist and delivering our vision. Corey truly wanted our night to be perfect and was invested in making sure the dance floor was always rocking. People came up to us, both old and young, and told us they had never seen a dance floor so full all night at a wedding. If you are looking for a DJ who is professional, artistic, easy to work with, and who will really care about making your day special, I can not recommend Corey and COS entertainment highly enough. He was the best I have ever seen at a wedding.

We were able to get everyone on the dancefloor. The only "bad" thing was that there were no bad songs to stop dancing at; I as the bride could not find a time to stop dancing as there were bangers after bangers playing. Of course the playlist was curated by us, but he was able to set the right mood transitioning to each song & adding other songs that we didn't think of.

When we had our zoom call months before our wedding to discuss with him, we were laughing and had a great impression of him. 

The price we got was a great deal, and the light add-on really set the mood and matched our color palette during the dinner which later turned to party lights with the music.  

I recommend this vendor as they offer things like photobooths, lighting/effects & live music.  We initially had a different DJ but he left the company so we changed to DJ Marc but I can say that he DELIVERED.  We recommend him as he's really great, communicates well and helps us consider things we didn't even think about as we didn't have a planner. 

Definitely book with them for your events, you won't regret it!

I want to add that we used them both for the ceremony and reception so we had two different set ups. Our officiant was given a lapel mic and the sound quality was great. All of the videos from guests that I’ve been sent of the ceremony, You can hear every word from not only the officiant- but both my husband and I who were not miked up. I know I’ve been to a few weddings where you can’t hear anything or just hear the wind and every other word -so if that’s also something you’re worried about you will be in good hands with them- they know what they are doing. I would hire them again 100 times over.

dance-floor.author: Maressa
dance-floor.text: We got married, May 2024 and interviewed quite a few DJ and entertainment companies in the planning process.  We ended up choosing COS celebrations because after our first call with our DJ & MC, (CJ) we felt that he truly loved his job and wanted to make our day special. He was not there to just rake in money and treat our day as “another wedding.”  Although it was not within his scope of support, he even made us a detailed timeline on the first call and he was responsive in sending song recommendations when we asked for them.  COS Celebrations simplifies the planning process for couples with an awesome app that can be accessed on both your smartphone or computer. We were able to search and upload songs directly in the app and add them to the timeline. There is even a spot for detailed notes so that you can tell your DJ when to start and stop songs if you want to be specific. CJ went out of his way to go see our venue prior to our wedding so that he could get a feel for the space and make recommendations for setup of his equipment. He was also very responsive to any questions we had, taking our texts and calls at all hours of the day.  On wedding day, he showed up in a Tuexedo with a bow tie which we felt was a nice touch from a vendor who was not asked specifically to dress up and we had a lot of compliments from guests about how great of an MC he was. He did an OUSTANDING JOB at creating excitement and engagement on the dance floor – our pictures prove it! Thank you COS Celebrations for making our day perfect – we LOVE CJ!
dance-floor.title: COS Celebrations - CJ is the Best DJ!

dance-floor.text:

My wife and I got married at Jekyll Island on May 13, 2023. We provided Greg (our DJ) with about 50 songs that we wanted incorporated into cocktail hour, dinner and the party. Any DJ can spin some good tracks. What makes a GREAT DJ is their ability to read the room and give the people what they need to get the place jumpin.

Around 9:30 my wife looked around and noticed that the energy wasn’t where it should be. She promptly went over to Greg and said, “forget about our playlist, get the party going again”… The guy absolutely WENT OFF. For the next 2 hours not a single person was sitting down. At the end of the night people were demanding a third encore.

Aside from being amazing DJ’s, Corey and Greg are absolute gentlemen. Not only do I recommend their services, I guarantee your satisfaction. 

Thanks guys, you made the night!

- Bobby Ash

COS as a whole has amazing and quick communication starting before you even book your event! After booking they set you up with calls to explain everything and help ease the stress of planning/making a song list for your most special day!

In addition to the DJ we added a photo booth! COS personalizes your photo booth photo background before your big day so you have the perfect photo strip! Everyone had the BEST time with the photo booth and we got a lot of laughs once we saw them all!! We cannot thank COS enough for their amazing communication, professionalism, and fun personalities!
photo-booth.title: Liles Wedding!

photo-booth.author: Delaney F
photo-booth.text: COS was one of the most pleasant and easy to deal with vendors here on the Knot - I worked primarily with Kyle and DJ Marc, who were absolutely lovely and attentive people. They use an app and their website for planning, and are open with you for using email, text, Zoom, or phone calls which for a busy lawyer means the world over here! We used the add-ons for uplighting and the photo booth, and I must say both were stellar picks I'm so glad we did! As the night went on, the lights got better, and the photo booth was one of the most popular things. Kyle reached out every few months to help with the design for the photo booth and answered my endless questions, they have multiple payment options, and made sure I had everything I needed. Marc was incredibly friendly, helped make sure everything ran like a dream. Our dance floor was never empty, it was boisterous and intense all the way to the finish. Marc was understanding when I wanted to do a unique bouquet toss, took great care of us, handled requests flawlessly, and helped get everyone comfortable. I do wish that there had been some more slow songs played, or that a few of our specific requests had made it into the lineup better, but that was likely a miscommunication on my part rather than anything our fantastic DJ team did. If you say it, it will  happen, and these folks are here for you. Their pricing is incredibly fair, they handled all set up and tear down, and were a joy to work with. Definitely would hire for any celebration or future party!!

photo-booth.author: Emily
photo-booth.text: We absolutely loved working with Corey for our special day! He was very helpful, quick to respond, and always willing to hop on a call with us. The wedding went by so smoothly thanks to his guidance on announcements. The party didn’t stop thanks to the party playlist of songs he played! The Photo Booth and light add ons were so cool! And as a bonus the saxophone during cocktail hour was talked about all evening! We just highly recommend COS and thank you Corey for being so awesome!!!
photo-booth.title: A Dream Wedding!

CJ did a fantastic job of reading the room and keeping the energy high the whole time. The photo booth was also a huge hit, and Tyler and CJ were both so much fun and helpful throughout the entire night. We're so grateful to COS Celebrations + Entertainment for helping make our wedding day truly special.

photo-booth.text: DJ Corey is the best! He literally made our wedding day spectacular. From our first meeting with him we knew he was the DJ for us. The communication was phenomenal, always available for any questions and concerns. With that most importantly quick response as well. Come wedding day Corey made every effort to make our day special for us. From music timing and timelines and helping out with everything in between, we could not have had a better DJ. We had some extras of cold sparks and a photo booth; both were amazing and a big hit at our wedding. We could go on and on about how wonderful and special he truly made our day, but we believe if you met with him yourself you will see that too. So, thank you DJ Corey and Kyle for having a lasting impact on our wedding day, we wouldn't have it any other way. We will never be able to say thank you enough for how special our day was because of you. So once again thank you. With love Mr. and Mrs. Borzeka!

photo-booth.text: Corey is terrific! He’s professional, flexible, and so cool! He made the day just flow. We had a several issues where the timeline needed to be adjusted. photo-booth.title: 5 Stars! ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

photo-booth.author: Jordan E
photo-booth.text: Our wedding was amazing and such a party all thanks to DJ Corey and COS Celebrations! He was so helpful during the planning process and finding the 'vibes' we wanted during our reception! DJ Corey made sure that people stayed on the dance floor by playing the best music ever! We also did a photo booth with COS Celebrations and that was a huge hit with our guests!

lighting.author: Lexi K
lighting.text: I cannot recommend Corey from COS enough. He fully exceeded our expectations when we were supposed to have our wedding at the White Room back in October but it got postponed to November due to hurricane Milton. He was able to accommodate on short notice and fully helped make our postponed reception the best night ever. Between him playing the saxophone and playing music that catered to the crowd we couldn't get off the dance floor the whole night. The planning process was so seamless (even with my million little questions and last minute additions) with the help from Corey and Kyle. We added the Saxophone, violin, uplighting, and photo booth, don't skip out on the sax it is fully worth it to have a little bit of live music!!! Would recommend a million times over again 11/10, I can't thank them enough!!

lighting.author: Chelsea
lighting.text: We were lucky enough to book COS Celebrations and DJ Corey for our NYE wedding at the end of 2023.  Corey immediately came across as an organized and reliable professional that knows how to have fun! We were able to meet with Corey prior to our wedding (virtually as we live 2 time zones away) and he made the entire process fun and personalized to exactly what we wanted.  We had secured a wedding planner and day of coordinator, but honestly, I could see how working with Corey you may not even need that (but shout out to Kelsi Elizabeth Events for being the best planner!!).  He was extremely communicative during the days leading up to and during our wedding, always making sure we were taken care of and having a great time.  We opted to add the Saxaphone add on and it was INCREDIBLE.  Everyone loved it and really got the party pumped up for NYE.  We also booked his extra lighting, cold sparklers and photobooth - everything was so great and really completed the event.  I could not recommend Corey enough; he made our day so special and provided a top-notch service.  You need Corey/COS on your vendor team!!
lighting.title: Best DJ in St. Augustine!!

lighting.author: Victoria C
lighting.text:
COS was fantastic. We really appreciated being able to book our ceremony, cocktail hour and reception music, dance floor lighting, and extra audio equipment through one company.

Most importantly, Greg was EXCELLENT. From helping us with our music selection, playing the saxophone live, learning songs that were special to us, and managing the energy and flow of the wedding, Greg delivered 100% effort on each. All our guests were so impressed with him too - we got so many compliments, especially when he was on the dance floor with the guests ripping the sax! We highly recommend Greg for any event. He made our wedding so incredibly special!

lighting.author: Christine
lighting.text: Corey helped us recruit a drummer and harpist and he played the sax all night long. We had a blast and our guests did too. He also brought lighting and a co2 gun which made the party that much more fun. At the end of the night my husband hopped on the drum set and it felt like we were at a concert!!! He also brought Mics for the night and all the little things we never thought of. Everything was top notch. We took a lot of time to find the right person to bring music into our wedding and Corey was very responsive from the beginning and willing to listen to all our ideas to make our wedding day perfect. He outshone the 10+ other vendors we had spoken to in our search and we will use him again for events in the future. Highly recommended him for your wedding or event you won’t be disappointed!
lighting.title: Corey gets the party started!

lighting.author: Sydney
lighting.text: When choosing a DJ for our wedding, I didn’t consider how big of a role a DJ could have on our wedding day. As a destination bride I knew very little about local vendors, but following our first meeting I knew COS Celebrations would be the perfect fit for our intimate wedding. Corey continued to be a huge help as our big day approached and honestly felt more helpful than my wedding planner at times. Prior to our wedding he over our timeline in great length and reached out to my vendors. On our wedding day, Corey did an outstanding job at playing songs that went along with the vibe of our guests. He killed it on sax during our reception and it was 100% worth it, so for those considering it I would definitely recommend! His whole set up was insane! He surprised us with cold sparklers which lit up the dance floor and looked amazing in photos. Corey was so great that even our other vendors and guests were raving about him. All in all, we had an amazing experience with COS Celebrations and you would be making a huge mistake by not choosing him to be a part of your big day. Thank you again for making our day perfect!
lighting.title: amazing & talented!!!

lighting.author: Ashley D
lighting.text: DJ CJ kept the party going! His energy is contagious and all of our guests had a great time on the dance floor. He managed to even get the guests who swore they don’t dance in public out on the floor! DJ CJ is super talented and flawlessly combined different genres of songs into each other, surprising everyone with what came next. The cold sparks and dance lighting are super fun, and really help set the mood! And you can never go wrong with the Photo Booth. DJ CJ made our night unforgettable, it’ll truly be a day to remember. Kyle is also amazing! She always replied to emails promptly and has all the answers. The entire COS celebrations team is awesome!

lighting.author: Catherine S
lighting.text: DJ C-Zone with COS Celebrations absolutely brought down the house at our wedding. The dance floor was packed the entire night, and to really encapsulate his talents in one sentence: he knows how to read a room. COS utilizes a mobile app where you can upload a playlist as well as songs you want them to avoid. What sets him apart is that he’s a true Disc Jockey AND a tenured musician (Saxophone). We cannot recommend getting the saxophone and full room uplighting add ons enough.  They made all the difference with making our reception look and feel like a movie montage! Every song was perfectly timed, he would foreshadow the next song to get the crowd excited, and he would step out on the dance floor to rip on the Sax at the perfect time EVERY time. It wasn’t too much or too little. It was absolutely perfect. I truly did not leave the dance floor the entire night until the very end when it was time to change into my send off dress! Thank you, DJ C-Zone for taking the time to listen to our dream as well as weighing in your recommendations based on your expertise that only made the experience 10x better. Our wedding was a total movie, and our guests haven’t stopped talking about our amazing DJ!

lighting.author: Josh
lighting.text:
We had the pleasure of working with Corey and his team for our wedding ceremony, cocktail hour, and reception. From the beginning, Corey was very impressive and made us feel confident he would provide great entertainment for our guests. He took note of any music requests we had and made us feel heard throughout the whole process- he had a very user friendly planning app for the music selection. His understanding of our goals for the music of the wedding was spotless. He brought so much energy and kept the dance floor packed all night. He went above and beyond on the day of- keeping us updated on what was next in the line up and checked if we needed a drink, water, etc. Everything from his sax talents to the uplighting was first class. All of our guests gave their highest compliments for the music for the whole evening. We are so thankful we found and booked Corey and COS- our wedding would not have been the same without him! We highly recommend using him for the perfect combination of live music/DJ for your special event. 

- The Appel’s
lighting.title: First Class

The months/weeks leading up to the wedding we felt so secure in this decision as their planning app kept us on course as to what we were missing and needed to be planning next as far as wedding music goes. 

Next was the actually wedding. Starting off the wedding with such fun good vibes. Guests were immediately impressed with the Jazz Sax cocktail hour! The cold sparks at the end of the first dance were perfectly timed and also a huge hit!! Reception, the dance floor was going all night long, just as we had hopped! And this is all thanks to our amazing DJ!!! Our wedding would not have been the same without COS Celebrations!!

10/10 recommend!!

lighting.author: Lindsey
lighting.text: I cannot sing COS Celebrations praises enough!!! Corey is incredible to work with from the planning stages, all the way through the event. Corey is attentive to detail and is extremely responsive- coordinating as many calls as necessary to ensure the day’s music is perfect. When planning our wedding, my #1 want was a timeline that allowed for maximum dance time and a packed dance floor for us to truly celebrate with friends. If you are looking for the same thing and want a DJ who truly brings the BEST energy and vibes- hiring Corey is a MUST. We not only used him as our DJ, but he also provided music for our ceremony and is the best Saxophone player I have ever heard! Our guests raved about the sax during cocktail hour and he even incorporated the sax during the reception with our music selection. We also got cold sparks through COS and were surprised with incredible uplighting for the reception. COS offers an easy to use planner that allows you to pick your playlist for every specific moment of the night- from dinner, to cake cutting, the dance floor, “surprise” moments, private dance, as well as areas to input where speeches will be given and verbiage you want Corey to use for announcements. He has a no-play list to ensure the night is caterer around not only what you want, but excludes anything you don’t want. He made the night all about us and it was EXACTLY what we wanted. The dance floor was packed the entire night and everyone loved the music, energy and Corey! We love COS and can’t wait to hire them for another event!!
lighting.title: DJ/ Entertainment

lighting.author: Doreen
lighting.text:
Nothing beats COS Celebrations and DJ/Saxophonist Corey Peterson when it comes to professionalism, quality of work, and creating a fun atmosphere for a wedding. My son's wedding this past weekend was incredibly beautiful and memorable, thanks to COS Celebrations which provided smooth saxophone tunes during the cocktail hour and DJ/MC during the reception that followed. COS also created a memorable and stunning atmosphere by adding cold sparks for the newlywed's first dance and uplights all throughout the room with gorgeous views of the ocean. Corey's music selection was brilliant and the guests were on their feet dancing until the end. We also added a Mirror X photo booth that captured unforgettable moments. It was such a huge hit with the guests!  

I made the decision to hire COS Celebrations/Corey Peterson after meeting him at the oceanfront venue so he can see the  lay of the land. He was very professional, definitely experienced, attentive to details, kind, and responsive to all my requests that followed. And most importantly, they offer very competitive rates!

If you are looking for all the things I described above, look no more. COS Celebrations and multi-talented Corey are the ultimate professionals. You will not regret it.
lighting.title: Ultimate Professionals

lighting.text:
Corey was an absolute blast! We could not have asked for a better DJ and MC for our wedding.  He brought the best energy and made every aspect of our wedding perfect.  We seriously would recommend Corey and COS 11/10 to everyone we know!  He was very responsive and proactive in the planning process.  Definitely recommend taking advantage of his Saxophone performances as well. 

Corey did a beautiful job with the up lighting on the dance floor and had an awesome cold spark set up for our entry into the reception area.  If you are looking for the perfect DJ for your wedding - stop looking and go with Corey.  We promise you will not regret it!

-Conner and Michelle
lighting.title: Absolutely the best experience with Corey and COS Celebrations!

lighting.text:
Let me begin by saying Corey was an absolute BLESSING on our day! When I first found his business, I contacted him & spoke with him on the phone prior to any commitment because he likes to get to know a bit about each “client” he is providing service for. I put client in quotes because there was not a single time we felt like just another client to him!

He followed up with me thoroughly before the wedding, verified everything I wanted & when, then delivered! Corey quickly and easily earned a stamp of approval from everyone at the wedding - you know you’re doing something right when the mother of the bride was beside herself! He catered to our every need & checked in with us throughout our reception to make sure we were happy. The uplighting he provided was absolutely beautiful as well!

This is truly someone with a passion for what he does, & we are so happy that we chose him for our day. Thank you COS Celebrations for making our day so incredible and going above & beyond. We’ll be shouting from the rooftops to book COS for ANY event!
PS: if you’re on the fence about booking him to play sax, get off that fence! We should’ve!

lighting.text:
We couldn't be happier with the experience we had with CJ (COS Celebrations) at our wedding! From our very first meeting, he was professional, friendly, and truly listened to what we wanted. He worked closely with us to understand our music preferences and seamlessly blended our favorite genres throughout the night.

The energy on the dance floor was electric from the first song to the last. CJ read the crowd perfectly and kept the momentum going all night. Even our guests who never dance were out there having a blast!

The sound and lighting setup was top-notch, and they handled all the announcements and transitions smoothly, keeping the evening on track. We also appreciated their punctuality and responsiveness leading up to the big day. It made a huge difference in reducing our stress.

If you're looking for a DJ who’s reliable, fun, and seriously talented, look no further. CJ helped make our wedding unforgettable, and we can’t recommend them highly enough!

lighting.text: We had a wonderful experience with Marc as our DJ at our wedding. Kyle helped with the initial planning and options followed by Marc. We were happy with their prompt responses, ability to pivot and do some outside the box stuff for our song choices and when the weather didn’t cooperate for our cold spark ending Marc didn’t say no, he pulled his sleeves up and said let’s do it. It was a once in a lifetime chance to get what we really wanted and he made it happen. Thank you so much

lighting.author: Erin
lighting.text: We had such a great experience with COS Celebrations booking CJ to DJ at our wedding! CJ was super professional and organized. He reached out months in advance to get to know us and what kind of music we want played at our wedding. We were able to choose specific songs we want played and songs we don’t want to hear. CJ also reached out to our venue to coordinate with them to make a timeline for the day. He also had all guests aged from 9-86 DANCING. He brought lighting and additional speakers as well which really set the mood. We were so relaxed and had so much fun on our wedding day thanks to CJ. We highly recommend him! :)
lighting.title: We had the best day!

lighting.author: Joshua
lighting.text:
We love everything about our night during the reception of our wedding. We already had string music for the ceremony, but DJ Marc also offered as backup for music in case our strings weren't there. We had about 55 guests or so at our wedding but DJ Marc knows how to read the crowd and create a party atmosphere for all our guests of different ages and backgrounds. We were able to get everyone on the dancefloor. The only "bad" thing was that there were no bad songs to stop dancing at; I as the bride could not find a time to stop dancing as there were bangers after bangers playing. Of course the playlist was curated by us, but he was able to set the right mood transitioning to each song & adding other songs that we didn't think of.

When we had our zoom call months before our wedding to discuss with him, we were laughing and had a great impression of him. 

The price we got was a great deal, and the light add-on really set the mood and matched our color palette during the dinner which later turned to party lights with the music.  

I recommend this vendor as they offer things like photobooths, lighting/effects & live music.  We initially had a different DJ but he left the company so we changed to DJ Marc but I can say that he DELIVERED.  We recommend him as he's really great, communicates well and helps us consider things we didn't even think about as we didn't have a planner. 

Definitely book with them for your events, you won't regret it!
lighting.title: Amazing & unforgettable time

app.text:
Corey is THE BEST wedding DJ! If you're reading this and on the fence about booking Corey at COS Celebrations, stop reading and book him! Corey was so accommodating from the start. My husband and I live across the country and Corey flexed his schedule so we could zoom with him after west coast working hours. They have a very user-friendly app making it beyond easy to allocate song selections for each milestone moment throughout the day (including a 'do not play' list!). We had another zoom call with Corey a few weeks before the wedding where we talked through all the details...I am not lying when we were on the call for almost 2 hours where Corey answered any and all of our questions, offering unbiased advice when we asked for it. 

The audio the day of the wedding was perfect. We had an outdoor ceremony and Corey has grade A equipment and sound set up so everyone could hear us and the officiant perfectly. No static, no microphone feedback, nothing! We also had some specific music timing requests that Corey nailed. The dance portion of our wedding was truly epic. We had the drummer (which I HIGHLY recommend!) and Corey surprised us with his sax and it was show stopping! 

Corey helped make our wedding day run so smoothly. He was able to seamlessly guide our guests from location to location throughout the day. His emcee skills, calm demeanor, professional manner, and genuine care in making sure our day was perfect was something we'll never forget. We're almost a month out from our wedding day and guests will still tell us how much fun the dance floor was and what a great addition Corey was to our day! A big THANK YOU to Corey and COS Celebrations!

We were able to get everyone on the dancefloor. The only "bad" thing was that there were no bad songs to stop dancing at; I as the bride could not find a time to stop dancing as there were bangers after bangers playing. Of course the playlist was curated by us, but he was able to set the right mood transitioning to each song & adding other songs that we didn't think of.

When we had our zoom call months before our wedding to discuss with him, we were laughing and had a great impression of him. 

The price we got was a great deal, and the light add-on really set the mood and matched our color palette during the dinner which later turned to party lights with the music.  

I recommend this vendor as they offer things like photobooths, lighting/effects & live music.  We initially had a different DJ but he left the company so we changed to DJ Marc but I can say that he DELIVERED.  We recommend him as he's really great, communicates well and helps us consider things we didn't even think about as we didn't have a planner. 

Definitely book with them for your events, you won't regret it!

Any DJ can spin some good tracks. What makes a GREAT DJ is their ability to read the room and give the people what they need to get the place jumpin.

She promptly went over to Greg and said, “forget about our playlist, get the party going again”… The guy absolutely WENT OFF. For the next 2 hours not a single person was sitting down. At the end of the night people were demanding a third encore.

Aside from being amazing DJ’s, Corey and Greg are absolute gentlemen. Not only do I recommend their services, I guarantee your satisfaction. 

Thanks guys, you made the night!
